edition: D. Prahlādācar (ed.), *Gītā-Tātparya-Nirṇaya of Ānandatīrtha-Bhagavatpādācārya, with the Nyāya-Dīpikā of Jayatīrtha and the Bhāva-Dīpa of Raghavendra-tīrtha*, Pūrṇaprajña Saṃśodhana Mandiram, Bangalore, 1987

expected_text_units.source_for_estimate: Madhva's prose tātparya-comments running through the Gītā's 700 ślokas plus three sub-commentaries

ground_truth_source: Nagesh D. Sonde Sanskrit+English (archive.org `geeta-bhashya-tatparya-nirnaya-by-madhvacharya`) is a comparator for sense; Madhwapracharavedike has the Bannañje edition for textual cross-check.
first_page_visual_quality_notes: Heuristic (KB/page ~29): producer 'PDFsharp 1.50.4589' + 10.6 MB / 371 pp suggests a born-digital text or near-text PDF, not a high-DPI scan. Likely ideal for direct text extraction.
ocr_friendliness_notes: If born-digital, pdftotext-grade. If image-PDF, low-DPI 1987 typescript — expect moderate OCR difficulty. Three commentaries stacked on one page require careful region segmentation.
